languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn gasps in indignation.{/n} "Are you truly asking me if I have violated one of the Omnissiah's core commandments as blithely as if you were asking to borrow my stylus? No, a thousand times no! How could such a thing even be wrought from a single servo-skull? A wicked mind of that calibre would require a receptacle of significant cogitational potential! I am deeply outraged by this insinuation, and simultaneously flattered by your assessment of my skills."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн задыхается от возмущения.{/n} "Вы действительно буднично спрашиваете меня, не попрал ли я одну из главных заповедей Омниссии, словно просите одолжить у меня стилус? Нет, тысячу раз нет! Да и разве можно сотворить подобное лишь из одного {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}сервочерепа{/g}? Злобный разум подобного калибра требует вместилище весьма немалого когитационного потенциала! Я глубоко возмущен этой инсинуацией и одновременно польщен вашими представлениями о моих навыках".

traits.locale_text: {n}Эоганн задыхается от возмущения.{/n} "Вы действительно буднично спрашиваете меня, не попрал ли я одну из главных заповедей Омниссии, словно просите одолжить у меня стилус? languages.text: {n}Eogunn emite un grito ahogado de indignación.{/n} «¿De verdad me está preguntando si he violado uno de los mandamientos centrales del Omnissiah con tanta despreocupación como si me pidiera una pluma? ¡No y mil veces no! ¿Cómo sería posible generar tal cosa con un solo {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocráneo{/g}? ¡Una mente perversa de ese calibre requeriría un receptáculo de un potencial cogitativo muy elevado! Estoy profundamente ofendido por esta insinuación, así como halagado por su percepción de mis capacidades».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn gasps in indignation.{/n} "Are you truly asking me if I have violated one of the Omnissiah's core commandments as blithely as if you were asking to borrow my stylus? No, a thousand times no! How could such a thing even be wrought from a single {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g}? A wicked mind of that calibre would require a receptacle of significant cogitational potential! I am deeply outraged by this insinuation, and simultaneously flattered by your assessment of my skills."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn emite un grito ahogado de indignación.{/n} «¿De verdad me está preguntando si he violado uno de los mandamientos centrales del Omnissiah con tanta despreocupación como si me pidiera una pluma? ¡No y mil veces no! ¿Cómo sería posible generar tal cosa con un solo servocráneo? ¡Una mente perversa de ese calibre requeriría un receptáculo de un potencial cogitativo muy elevado! Estoy profundamente ofendido por esta insinuación, así como halagado por su percepción de mis capacidades».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡愤慨地倒吸一口气。{/n}“您当真是在问我，有没有触犯欧姆尼赛亚的核心戒律？而且问得如此轻描淡写，就好像只是在跟我借一支笔？不，绝对没有！这种事情怎么可能仅凭一颗{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}伺服头骨{/g}就能实现？要装下那种级别的邪恶智能，需要一个拥有巨大思考潜能的容器才行！您的这种暗示让我深感愤慨，而同时我又因您对我能力的评价而感到受宠若惊。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn gasps in indignation.{/n} "Are you truly asking me if I have violated one of the Omnissiah's core commandments as blithely as if you were asking to borrow my stylus? No, a thousand times no! How could such a thing even be wrought from a single {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g}? A wicked mind of that calibre would require a receptacle of significant cogitational potential! I am deeply outraged by this insinuation, and simultaneously flattered by your assessment of my skills."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡愤慨地倒吸一口气。{/n}“您当真是在问我，有没有触犯欧姆尼赛亚的核心戒律？而且问得如此轻描淡写，就好像只是在跟我借一支笔？不，绝对没有！这种事情怎么可能仅凭一颗伺服头骨就能实现？要装下那种级别的邪恶智能，需要一个拥有巨大思考潜能的容器才行！您的这种暗示让我深感愤慨，而同时我又因您对我能力的评价而感到受宠若惊。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn laisse échapper un cri indigné.{/n} « Êtes-vous réellement en train de me demander si j'ai enfreint l'un des principaux commandements de l'Omnimessie avec la même insouciance que si vous cherchiez à m'emprunter un stylet ? Non, mille fois non ! Je ne vois même pas comment ce serait possible avec un seul {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocrâne{/g} ! Un esprit aussi malveillant aurait besoin d'un réceptacle au potentiel cognitif immense ! Je suis profondément choqué par ce que vous insinuez, et en même temps flatté par la valeur que vous accordez à mes talents. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn gasps in indignation.{/n} "Are you truly asking me if I have violated one of the Omnissiah's core commandments as blithely as if you were asking to borrow my stylus? No, a thousand times no! How could such a thing even be wrought from a single {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g}? A wicked mind of that calibre would require a receptacle of significant cogitational potential! I am deeply outraged by this insinuation, and simultaneously flattered by your assessment of my skills."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn laisse échapper un cri indigné.{/n} « Êtes-vous réellement en train de me demander si j'ai enfreint l'un des principaux commandements de l'Omnimessie avec la même insouciance que si vous cherchiez à m'emprunter un stylet ? Non, mille fois non ! Je ne vois même pas comment ce serait possible avec un seul servocrâne ! Un esprit aussi malveillant aurait besoin d'un réceptacle au potentiel cognitif immense ! Je suis profondément choqué par ce que vous insinuez, et en même temps flatté par la valeur que vous accordez à mes talents. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn keucht indigniert.{/n} "Fragt Ihr mich ernsthaft, ob ich gegen eines der wichtigsten Gebote des Omnissiah verstoßen habe, als würdet Ihr mich bitten, Euch meinen Griffel zu borgen? Nein, tausend Mal nein! Wie könnte ein solches Ding überhaupt aus einem einzelnen {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Servoschädel{/g} geschaffen werden? Ein kranker Verstand dieses Kalibers bedürfte eines Behälters mit beträchtlichem cogitatorischem Potenzial. Ich bin ob dieser Unterstellung empört, fühle mich aber gleichzeitig von Eurer Beurteilung meiner Fähigkeiten geschmeichelt.
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn gasps in indignation.{/n} "Are you truly asking me if I have violated one of the Omnissiah's core commandments as blithely as if you were asking to borrow my stylus? No, a thousand times no! How could such a thing even be wrought from a single {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g}? A wicked mind of that calibre would require a receptacle of significant cogitational potential! I am deeply outraged by this insinuation, and simultaneously flattered by your assessment of my skills."

Nein, tausend Mal nein! Wie könnte ein solches Ding überhaupt aus einem einzelnen Servoschädel geschaffen werden? Ein kranker Verstand dieses Kalibers bedürfte eines Behälters mit beträchtlichem cogitatorischem Potenzial. Ich bin ob dieser Unterstellung empört, fühle mich aber gleichzeitig von Eurer Beurteilung meiner Fähigkeiten geschmeichelt.

languages.text: {n}エオグンは憤慨して息を呑む。{/n}「私のタッチペンを貸してくれとでも言うように、本当にオムニサイアの戒律に違反したのか？いや、その何千倍も違う！{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}サーボ・スカル{/g}1つでそんなことができるのか？そのような邪悪な精神には、相当な潜在能力を持った受け皿が必要なはずだ！私はこの侮辱に深く憤慨すると同時に、私の技術を評価していただき光栄に思います」。
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn gasps in indignation.{/n} "Are you truly asking me if I have violated one of the Omnissiah's core commandments as blithely as if you were asking to borrow my stylus? No, a thousand times no! How could such a thing even be wrought from a single {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g}? A wicked mind of that calibre would require a receptacle of significant cogitational potential! I am deeply outraged by this insinuation, and simultaneously flattered by your assessment of my skills."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, öfkeyle nefesini tutuyor.{/n} "Gerçekten bana Hermesih'in temel emirlerinden birini ihlal edip etmediğimi mi soruyorsunuz? Hem de böyle rahatça! Hayır, bin kere hayır! Böyle bir şey, tek bir {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}hizmeletten{/g} nasıl çıkarılabilir ki? O kalibrede şeytani bir zihin, önemli bir bilişsel potansiyele sahip bir hazne gerektirir! Bu imadan çok rahatsız oldum, aynı zamanda yeteneklerimin potansiyelini görüş şeklinizden de gurur duydum."

Bu imadan çok rahatsız oldum, aynı zamanda yeteneklerimin potansiyelini görüş şeklinizden de gurur duydum."
